name: Meat Nests
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the ground beef, flour, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Add the bread crumbs and milk to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Line ungreased muffin tins with the meat mixture, filling each about 1/4-inch thick.
4. Fill each nest with 2 tablespoons of mashed potatoes.
5. Sprinkle paprika over the top of the mashed potatoes in each nest.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes, or until cooked through.
